mechanism_summary: The VP CMP_MAP gradient stage added on top of cmplog in vpc interferes with I2S's direct substitution of the 0x0E37 codepoint operand, preventing reliable placement and causing vpc to lose to cmplog alone.
one_line: VP gradient stage interferes with I2S codepoint substitution, degrading vpc vs cmplog

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP gradient stage in vpc inflates the interesting-bucket corpus with extra entries, polluting the corpus and starving the I2S-substituted U+0EB9 path that cmplog cleanly resolved; the added VP technique is the loss axis.
one_line: VP corpus inflation in vpc starves I2S-planted codepoint path that cmplog alone resolves
